\tzpentry{ID3536}{Gdelta Quantum Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3536 introduces Gdelta Quantum Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Big[-\frac{\hbar^2}{2\mu}\nabla_r^2 + V_{\text{rel}}(r) + g\delta(r)\Big]\Phi(r,\theta)=E_{\text{rel}}\Phi(r,\theta), \]
